title: https://github.com/ShunsukeHayashi/agent-skill-bus FUGUE/Kernelに必要か、批判的吟味せよ
summary_text: `Kernel ledger patch` の acceptance rubric はこれです。 **Must Record** - `lane run entry`: `ts`, `run_id`, `lane/provider/role`, `requested_provider`, `actual_provider/model`, `ok|exit_code|failure_class`, `latency_ms`, `tokens` if available, `fallback_chain|retry_count` - `provider state snapshot`: current normalized provider state used for diff comparison - `provider diff entry`: `ts`, `provider`, `changed_fields`, `severity`, `before/after summary`, `source_run_id` **Must Not Change** - Queue authority, scheduler, job-claim, routing, or lane-selection behavior - Existing Kernel SSOT: ledger must stay append-only sidecar, not become a new control plane - External write authority: non-Kernel actors must not mutate execution state - Existing orchestration outcome semantics: success/failure gating must stay unchanged when ledger is enabled **Mandatory Tests** - `bootstrap`: missing ledger/state files initialize cleanly and do not fail the run - `append`: successful run appends one lane-run entry; provider change appends one diff entry - `no-diff/no-duplicate`: identical snapshot produces no diff; repeat processing does not duplicate entries - `malformed input`: bad snapshot or partial write is rejected/isolated without corrupting prior ledger data - `no-regression`: current Kernel orchestration path, exit codes, and authority boundaries are unchanged with ledger enabled - `atomicity`: failed ledger write does not leave partial state or mixed before/after records Accept only if all three headings pass as-is. `fallback_used: true` `missing_lane: Claude` `fallback_provider: copilot-cli` `fallback_reason: You've hit your limit · resets Mar 20 at 9pm (Asia/Tokyo)`
